name: Playback Indicator
overview: Shows direct-play / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows in the Jellyfin web UI.
description: A Jellyfin plugin that automatically calculates whether each episode or movie can direct-play on your current device, and shows a colored badge in the web UI. Badges are calculated using your device's actual playback profile — no manual configuration required.

versions.changelog: Initial release: direct-play and transcode badges on episode/movie rows
